synopsis: Palpatine's Order 66 has changed everything. As Jedi are slaughtered across the galaxy, one has managed to cheat fate—but for how long? Badly wounded by the same troops he previously led to victory, Master Quinlan Vos retreats into the jungle wilderness of the Wookiee homeworld Kashyyyk. As the clones close in, Vos must choose—stay and fight, or run and put those he loves in danger of the newborn Empire's wrath?
title: Republic #83: Hidden Enemy, Part 3
